expectations.text: The Q&A is added to RC-ALERT-01 (Setup article, not Management article)
expectations.evidence: Output file is RC-ALERT-01_Alerts-and-Notifications-Setup.md; summary confirms 'Article Modified: RC-ALERT-01'

expectations.text: The added question is phrased as a real user would ask it (not as a policy statement)
expectations.evidence: Question reads: 'Do alerts fire when a project is in draft or development status?' — natural user phrasing

expectations.text: The answer is direct and complete — explains the behavior and why
expectations.evidence: Answer explains production status requirement and that draft mode prevents accidental sends during setup/testing

expectations.text: The article metadata version number is incremented
expectations.evidence: Version field in output file is 1.1 (original was 1.0)

expectations.text: The skill notes whether KB-REFERENCE-MAP needs updating
expectations.evidence: Summary explicitly states 'No cross-reference changes needed (KB-REFERENCE-MAP.md not updated as no new article references were added)'
